chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products to be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A business concept representing a classification category, identified by a unique CATEGORY_ID and described by a CATEGORY_NAME.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master dataset containing the records of all registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID key (customer master record).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER
---------------------
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | - One or more delivery/billing addresses | - Geographic region for tax calculation | - Active/inactive status | - Must place at least one order to remain active | - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is the order-fulfillment entity representing the package(s) being sent to fulfill a sales order, including status (e.g., PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED), ship timestamp, tracking information, and its relationship to the associated sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being fulfilled | NO | | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line 1 represents a product listing for Wireless Headphones priced at €79.99.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an individual product purchase entry within a sales order that records the product, its price at the time of ordering, and references exactly one product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Synonyms**: line item, order detail, order row | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order representing a specific product, its quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
-------------------------------
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO | | | QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO | | | LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO | | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order represents a confirmed purchase transaction in an e-commerce system, including customer intent, items, quantities, pricing, and fulfillment status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An instance of a payment transaction linked to a single Sales Order, detailing the payment method used.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being paid | NO | | | PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO | | | AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO | | | CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Payment creation timestamp | NO | | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product name refers to the human-readable name of a product used for display and communication to customers, distinct from its internal identifier.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single, identifiable item available for sale in the catalog, characterized by a unique SKU, name, price, active status, and association to exactly one category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product | **Related Concepts**: SalesOrder, Product | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exac

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric value representing the count of units in an order or inventory, i.e., the quantity of items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | | QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order Header represents the top-level information for a customer's sales order, containing identifiers and metadata for the order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
-------------------------------
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order. | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CATEGORY_ID column in the TB_CATEGORY table that uniquely identifies a product category (i.e., the category identifier).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY
-------------------------------
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | Category         → TB_CATEGORY

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master catalogue of all products available for sale, identified by PRODUCT_ID, representing the product catalog in the business data governance context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT
-------------------------------
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price of a product in euros, as recorded at the time of an order (historical unit price).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Confirmation
entities_post_resolution.definition: The order lifecycle state indicating that an order has been confirmed and is authorized for processing, with payment completed where applicable.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: IS_ACTIVE is a boolean flag that indicates whether a product or item is currently active and available for customers to place orders (i.e., for sale).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|

| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | - Active/inactive status | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: A policy detailing the conditions under which customers can return products and receive refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Master Record For
entities_post_resolution.definition:
CUSTOMER_MASTER

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact information, regional affiliation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores catalog of products with identifiers, pricing, category reference, and active status for the product catalog and inventory.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the hierarchical category information for products, including each category's id, name, and an optional reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line item details for each order, including product, quantity, pricing, and the calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments linked to customer orders, including the method used, the amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments for orders, including where and when each shipment occurred, its tracking identifier, and current status.
